title: Amtech E1120 145mm (5.7") Rasp Plane
features: MULTI-MATERIAL USE: Shapes wood, aluminium, fibreglass and rubber for carpentry, craft and DIY finishing work.
LIGHTWEIGHT CONTROL: Aluminium body reduces fatigue, helping you maintain accuracy during shaping tasks.
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable handle improves balance and control when smoothing edges or trimming surfaces.
COMPACT 145MM SIZE: Easy to manoeuvre in tight areas, making it ideal for modelling, pipework shaping or repairs.
DIY & TRADE READY: A practical rasp plane for block plane-style shaping, installation jobs and finishing applications.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Rasp file See more
